TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tayang go mki sku Byori Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 602.88 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 524.2 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 59.69 km¬≤), 4,814 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,508 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,986 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 83%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. Taian syang hiya' ga maki squ Miaoli kyeng ka sobih Taycyu na qalang rgyax'Tayal. ays ptyaw sebu Tayang go ays psgayun 8 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, B'anux , Maylubung , Mepuwal , Mabanan , Malabang , Suru , Pakwari , Gali-hwan , Matabalay , Mabatuan , Tabilas , Maibagah , Sakuhan , Swasiq , Maytayax , Quwis awi' . lalu' Taian syang. Taian syang hiya' ga maki squ Miaoli kyeng ka sobih Taycyu na qalang rgyax 'Tayal. Tai'an qalang na ulay yalaw gi pzyux qu ulay nya ‚Ä≤san nha, sllwan nha "Tai'an qalang na ulay". tuqi qsya' Llyung na Tai'an syang ga llyung Mayri ki llyung Taxu. rekisi sraral maki na' Gipun, kwara' qalang na Tai'an syang ga ubuy squ Sincik su'tahu gun, masuq mpciriq lga yasa iyugun nha smi' sa qalang ryax 'Tayal. aki nha pslalu' Miaoli kyeng Ta'an syang, ana ga mtnaq lalu' na Taycyu kyeng Ta'an syang. kawas te 1952 te mspat byacing, 'iyugun nha pslalu' sa Ta'an syang, m_yan "kwo tay min an" teta si mqoyat krryax ma'. hmgiru lmosay Kya qu rgyax ptlaman,rgyax Malabang, ulay Taian, Papak Waqa' kwocya kongyeng,Taian stsan qeqaya' sraral, Chingan qalang kni'an sraral ru tuqi' sraral. tuqi 'san kya qu "kwotaw 3 Syan", "Tay 3 Syan", "Syan taw 118 haw". basu lglgan ga kya "Miaoli 61", "Miaoli 62", "Miaoli 63", Miaoli 64"ru "Miaoli 63" "Sincyu k_yun". kisya' glgan Ungat kisya' glgan hiya spyangan na pinbahu Qapu',qwaw trakis, ngta' qnazyat rgyax,ali',qwirux, kaway, hwolongkwo', qurip, warang. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Chingan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Shilin pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Mepuwal pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Sakuhan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Matu'uwal pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Maylubung pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas Taian pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas
S.PHON: tajaŇč …£o mki s~…ēku ő≤jori keŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na tajan ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. taian s~…ējaŇč ńßija Ē …£a maki s~…ēqu miaoli kjeŇč ka s~…ēoő≤ińß taj ¶~ ®ju na qalaŇč r…£jax Ētajal. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u tajaŇč …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, ő≤ Ēanux , majluő≤uŇč , mepuwal , maő≤anan , malaő≤aŇč , s~…ēuru , pakwari , …£ali-ńßwan , mataő≤alaj , maő≤atuan , taő≤ilas~…ē , maiő≤a…£ańß , s~…ēakuńßan , s~…ēwas~…ēiq , majtajax , quwis~…ē awi Ē . lalu Ē taian s~…ējaŇč. taian s~…ējaŇč ńßija Ē …£a maki s~…ēqu miaoli kjeŇč ka s~…ēoő≤ińß taj ¶~ ®ju na qalaŇč r…£jax Ētajal. tai Ēan qalaŇč na ulaj jalaw …£i pzjux qu ulaj nja *s~…ēan nńßa, s~…ēllwan nńßa "tai Ēan qalaŇč na ulaj". tuqi qs~…ēja Ē lljuŇč na tai Ēan s~…ējaŇč …£a lljuŇč majri ki lljuŇč taxu. rekis~…ēi s~…ēraral maki na Ē …£ipun, kwara Ē qalaŇč na tai Ēan s~…ējaŇč …£a uő≤uj s~…ēqu s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik s~…ēu Ētańßu …£un, mas~…ēuq mp ¶~ ®iriq l…£a jas~…ēa iju…£un nńßa s~…ēmi Ē s~…ēa qalaŇč rjax Ētajal. aki nńßa ps~…ēlalu Ē miaoli kjeŇč ta Ēan s~…ējaŇč, ana …£a mtnaq lalu Ē na taj ¶~ ®ju kjeŇč ta Ēan s~…ējaŇč. kawas~…ē te **** te ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč, Ēiju…£un nńßa ps~…ēlalu Ē s~…ēa ta Ēan s~…ējaŇč, m…ôjan "kwo taj min an" teta s~…ēi mqojat krrjax ma Ē. ńßm…£iru lmos~…ēaj kja qu r…£jax ptlaman,r…£jax malaő≤aŇč, ulaj taian, papak waqa Ē kwo ¶~ ®ja koŇčjeŇč,taian s~…ēts~…ēan qeqaja Ē s~…ēraral, ¶~ ®ńßiŇčan qalaŇč kni Ēan s~…ēraral ru tuqi Ē s~…ēraral. tuqi Ēs~…ēan kja qu "kwotaw * s~…ējan", "taj * s~…ējan", "s~…ējan taw *** ńßaw". ő≤as~…ēu l…£l…£an …£a kja "miaoli **", "miaoli **", "miaoli **", miaoli **"ru "miaoli **" "s~…ēin ¶~ ®ju k…ôjun". kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an uŇčat kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an ńßija s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu qapu Ē,qwaw trakis~…ē, Ňčta Ē qnazjat r…£jax,ali Ē,qwirux, kawaj, ńßwoloŇčkwo Ē, qurip, waraŇč. ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj ¶~ ®ńßiŇčan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj s~…ēńßilin pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj mepuwal pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj s~…ēakuńßan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj matu Ēuwal pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj majluő≤uŇč pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē taian pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē
S.FORM: Tayang go mki sku Byori Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 602.88 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 524.2 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 59.69 km¬≤), 4,814 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,508 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,986 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 83%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. Taian syang hiya' ga maki squ Miaoli kyeng ka sobih Taycyu na qalang rgyax'Tayal. ays ptyaw sebu Tayang go ays psgayun 8 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, B'anux , Maylubung , Mepuwal , Mabanan , Malabang , Suru , Pakwari , Gali-hwan , Matabalay , Mabatuan , Tabilas , Maibagah , Sakuhan , Swasiq , Maytayax , Quwis awi' . lalu' Taian syang. Taian syang hiya' ga maki squ Miaoli kyeng ka sobih Taycyu na qalang rgyax 'Tayal. Tai'an qalang na ulay yalaw gi pzyux qu ulay nya ‚Ä≤san nha, sllwan nha "Tai'an qalang na ulay". tuqi qsya' Llyung na Tai'an syang ga llyung Mayri ki llyung Taxu. rekisi sraral maki na' Gipun, kwara' qalang na Tai'an syang ga ubuy squ Sincik su'tahu gun, masuq mpciriq lga yasa iyugun nha smi' sa qalang ryax 'Tayal. aki nha pslalu' Miaoli kyeng Ta'an syang, ana ga mtnaq lalu' na Taycyu kyeng Ta'an syang. kawas te 1952 te mspat byacing, 'iyugun nha pslalu' sa Ta'an syang, m_yan "kwo tay min an" teta si mqoyat krryax ma'. hmgiru lmosay Kya qu rgyax ptlaman,rgyax Malabang, ulay Taian, Papak Waqa' kwocya kongyeng,Taian stsan qeqaya' sraral, Chingan qalang kni'an sraral ru tuqi' sraral. tuqi 'san kya qu "kwotaw 3 Syan", "Tay 3 Syan", "Syan taw 118 haw". basu lglgan ga kya "Miaoli 61", "Miaoli 62", "Miaoli 63", Miaoli 64"ru "Miaoli 63" "Sincyu k_yun". kisya' glgan Ungat kisya' glgan hiya spyangan na pinbahu Qapu',qwaw trakis, ngta' qnazyat rgyax,ali',qwirux, kaway, hwolongkwo', qurip, warang. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Chingan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Shilin pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Mepuwal pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Sakuhan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Matu'uwal pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Maylubung pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas Taian pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas

s~…ēraral, ¶~ ®ńßiŇčan qalaŇč kni Ēan s~…ēraral ru tuqi Ē s~…ēraral. tuqi Ēs~…ēan kja qu "kwotaw * s~…ējan", "taj * s~…ējan", "s~…ējan taw *** ńßaw". ő≤as~…ēu l…£l…£an …£a kja "miaoli **", "miaoli
